_comment: Curated matching table for the LIVE Artificial Analysis benchmark source (Block J / T45). The artificial-analysis adapter (pipeline/adapters/artificial-analysis.mjs) fetches the AA public leaderboard and, for each model, looks up its AA `slug` in `map` below to resolve the catalog (vendor, id) to enrich. RULES: (1) ONLY a slug listed here emits — an AA model with no mapping is silently dropped (fail safe: never fuzzily matched, never mis-attributed, never introduced as a new id); (2) numbers come from the live feed and are CITED to `source` (a reference, not our verdict — the AA API terms require attribution, which the `source` + 'verify at the source' framing satisfies); (3) every emitted benchmark is provenance-stamped (indicative + source + lastVerified). Only unambiguous matches are mapped — moving-target aliases (e.g. mistral-large-latest, deepseek-chat) are deliberately left out because a fixed AA version could mis-attribute. `_exampleMap` shows the entry shape and is NOT read by the adapter. Requires ARTIFICIAL_ANALYSIS_API_KEY for an online run; `--offline` replays pipeline/sources/artificial-analysis.json.
